items.title: Kristaps Porzingis tore his ACL my first game covering the Knicks for @theathletic.com. I'm not an OG like @stevepopper.bsky.social or @sbondynba.bsky.social but those were bleak times in a dysfunctional 20 year run. Lots of Knicks fans thought they'd never make the Finals. Happy
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: Kristaps Porzingis tore his ACL my first game covering the Knicks for @theathletic.com. I'm not an OG like @stevepopper.bsky.social or @sbondynba.bsky.social but those were bleak times in a dysfunctional 20 year run. Lots of Knicks fans thought they'd never make the Finals. Happy for them now.
